---
title: "Leonardo Carletto"
subtitle: "Graduando em Estatística · UFLA"
image: profile.png
sidebar: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/leocarletto
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leocarletto/
---

Bio curta aqui. (Página fixa — edite este texto.)
